diffCoverage.notes: Root cause confirmed from the live store (same body under two msg_ids 0.75s apart); fix applied + tested on both the store and ui seams.

findings.evidence: Evidence bundle status=pass with attested tests/lint/ui/smoke checks; the offline test proves store-side dedupe across differing msg_ids; the live db-after-fix artifact records 0 outgoing (thread,body) duplicates after the rebuild. Architecture + reliability reviewers pass; the identical-rapid-send collapse is recorded as an accepted low risk.

summary: fix-outgoing-echo-dupe is honestly done. Root cause (Zalo's listener echo carrying a different msg_id than the send response) was confirmed from the live SQLite store and fixed at both seams: the store skips a recent same-thread/same-body outgoing echo, and the ui store merges the echo into the optimistic bubble. Offline test + live db-state proof show no outgoing duplicates; build/lint/check are clean. Pass.
